message:
test(fwc): add invoke denial and session/pipeline/history integration tests

Two new CUAL integration tests covering cross-module observable behavior:

invoke_denial_records_history_and_suggests_recovery_actions:
- Triggers a preflight-denied invoke and asserts the response carries
  status="denied", phase="preflight", error.type="policy-denied"
- Verifies next_actions contains recovery suggestions (fwc status,
  fwc simulate)
- Confirms the denial is recorded in history with status="denied"

session_pipeline_history_workflow_persists_agent_context:
- Starts a named agent session, runs a pipeline dry-run across GitHub
  and Slack connectors
- Asserts history entries are tagged with the session ID
- Verifies session context (bead ID, agent name, operations_completed)
  persists through session show

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
